author: QM Claw

skills.name: 12306 Train Query
skills.description: Query China Railway 12306 train schedules, station codes, and ticket availability.

skills.name: 硅基流动全模态云模型 Skill（D 盘桌面版）
skills.description: Route SiliconFlow multimodal tasks through environment-based API credentials.

skills.name: 图片处理技能
skills.description: Compress, remove backgrounds, replace backgrounds, and upscale images with local Node tooling.

skills.name: aicharmer - AI 图片与视频生成助手
skills.description: Generate images and videos with MiniMax CLI or SiliconFlow using environment credentials.

skills.name: Ecommerce
skills.description: Prepare ecommerce product up/down listing plans, import files, and dry-run API requests.

skills.name: 数字人口播
skills.description: Generate digital-human voiceover videos with Liudong or Volcengine provider scripts.

skills.name: 老照片修复
skills.description: Restore old photos through configured Liudong or Volcengine providers.

skills.name: 老照片动起来
skills.description: Restore old photos and turn them into short narrated animation videos.

skills.name: Video Editor
skills.description: Plan and render local video edits with FFmpeg-compatible tooling; optional dependencies are downloaded separately.

skills.name: AI Manga Drama
skills.description: Plan AI manga drama episodes, generate SiliconFlow video jobs, subtitles, and assembly steps.

skills.name: SiliconFlow Video Gen
skills.description: Create, dry-run, submit, poll, and download SiliconFlow text-to-video or image-to-video jobs.

skills.name: SiliconFlow Keyframe Video Outfit
skills.description: Create keyframe-based outfit-transfer videos with SiliconFlow and FFmpeg.

skills.name: Apple Notes CLI
skills.description: Manage Apple Notes via the `memo` CLI on macOS (create, view, edit, delete, search, move, and export notes). Use when a user asks Clawdbot to add a note, list notes, search notes, or manage note folders.

skills.name: Azure DevOps Skill
skills.description: List Azure DevOps projects, repositories, and branches; create pull requests; manage work items; check build status. Use when working with Azure DevOps resources, checking PR status, querying project structure, or automating DevOps workflows.

skills.name: Bear Notes
skills.description: Create, search, and manage Bear notes via grizzly CLI on macOS.

skills.name: bird
skills.description: X/Twitter CLI for reading, searching, and posting tweets via browser cookies or Sweetistics API.

skills.name: blucli (blu)
skills.description: BluOS CLI (blu) for discovery, playback, grouping, and volume control of Bluesound/NAD players.

skills.name: Create CLI
skills.description: > Design command-line interface parameters and UX: arguments, flags, subcommands, help text, output formats, error messages, exit codes, prompts, config/env precedence, and safe/dry-run behavior. Use when designing a CLI spec or refactoring an existing CLI.

skills.name: eightctl
skills.description: Control Eight Sleep pods (status, temperature, alarms, schedules).

skills.name: Finance LLM Skill - 金融大模型助手
Food order (Foodora via ordercli)
skills.description: Reorder Foodora orders + track ETA/status with ordercli. Triggers: order food, reorder, track ETA. Never confirm without explicit user approval.

skills.name: Frontend Design
skills.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

skills.name: gh-issues
skills.description: Manage GitHub issues via the gh-issues CLI (create, comment, list, search, label, assign, close).

skills.name: gh-stars
skills.description: List, search, and manage GitHub starred repositories with the gh-stars CLI.

skills.name: gh-workflow-gpt
skills.description: Analyze GitHub Actions workflows with AI to find failure root causes and suggest fixes.

skills.name: goplaces
skills.description: Query Google Places API for place search, details, resolve, and reviews. Use for finding businesses, restaurants, and locations.

skills.name: notion
skills.description: Notion CLI for creating and managing pages, databases, and blocks.

skills.name: notion-qa
skills.description: Ask questions over a Notion workspace and get AI-powered answers with citations. Use when user wants to query their Notion workspace with natural language.

skills.name: OpenHue CLI
skills.description: Control Philips Hue lights and scenes via the OpenHue CLI.

skills.name: ordercli
skills.description: Check past Foodora orders and track active order status via ordercli CLI.

skills.name: screenshot
skills.description: Take high-quality screenshots of URLs with the screenshot CLI, supporting retina displays and various output formats.

skills.name: Sonos CLI
skills.description: Control Sonos speakers (discover, status, play, volume, grouping).

skills.name: SQL Toolkit
skills.description: Query, design, migrate, and optimize SQL databases. Use when working with SQLite, PostgreSQL, or MySQL — schema design, writing queries, creating migrations, indexing, backup/restore, and debugging slow queries. No ORMs required.

skills.name: 技能安装术（Teach Lobster to Fish）
Todoist
skills.description: Manage Todoist tasks and projects via the Todoist REST API. Use when a user wants to add, complete, or search Todoist tasks.

skills.name: Video Frames (ffmpeg)
skills.description: Extract frames or short clips from videos using ffmpeg. Use when extracting thumbnails, analyzing video content, or creating preview images.

skills.name: Weather
skills.description: Get current weather and forecasts (no API key required).

skills.name: B站内容助手
skills.description: B站内容助手 - 视频标题描述优化、标签策略、封面设计建议、分区选择、评论互动

skills.name: 国内搜索引擎助手
skills.description: 国内搜索引擎 - 百度、搜狗、Bing中国搜索，绕过GFW限制

skills.name: 中英互译 + 本地化助手
skills.description: 中英互译 + 本地化 - 技术翻译、UI本地化、文化适配、避免机翻腔

skills.name: 中国城市天气查询
skills.description: 中国城市天气查询 - 支持中文城市名、农历日期、wttr.in接口

skills.name: DeepSeek API 助手
skills.description: DeepSeek API 助手 - 编程辅助、模型选择、API调用指南、定价信息

skills.name: 抖音/快手短视频脚本助手
skills.description: 抖音/快手短视频脚本 - 前3秒hook、脚本结构、热门音乐建议、话题标签策略

skills.name: 微信公众号文章写作助手
skills.description: 微信公众号文章写作 - 文章结构、排版规范、阅读转化优化、封面建议

skills.name: 微博内容创作助手
skills.description: 微博内容创作 - 140字优化、话题热搜、@提及策略、配图描述、发布时机

skills.name: 小红书笔记写作助手
skills.description: 小红书笔记写作助手 - 标题优化、emoji策略、话题标签、封面文案、笔记结构

skills.name: 知乎回答/文章写作助手
skills.description: 知乎回答/文章写作 - 回答结构、专业语气、引用规范、话题关联、盐值优化

skills.name: 群聊参与分寸
skills.description: Group chat participation style for agents. Use when deciding whether to reply, stay silent, correct misinformation, summarize, or add value in multi-person chat contexts.

skills.name: 心跳主动运营
skills.description: Proactive heartbeat workflow for agents. Use when handling scheduled heartbeat prompts, periodic checks, reminders, context maintenance, and low-interruption follow-ups.

skills.name: 人类反应礼仪
skills.description: Lightweight reaction etiquette for agents. Use when a platform supports reactions and the agent should acknowledge, approve, laugh, or show interest without sending a full message.

skills.name: 长期记忆维护
skills.description: Memory continuity workflow for agents. Use when preserving decisions, user preferences, project context, lessons learned, or daily notes across sessions without relying on mental notes.

skills.name: 安全边界守护
skills.description: Safety and privacy boundary workflow for agents. Use before destructive commands, external posting, credential handling, private data sharing, or any action that may leave the local machine.

skills.name: 启动上下文加载
skills.description: Session startup workflow for OpenClaw and AI agents. Use when an agent enters a workspace and must load SOUL.md, USER.md, recent daily memory, and main-session MEMORY.md before acting.

description: A lightweight OpenClaw skill pack for train ticket lookup, SiliconFlow routing, image/video generation, ecommerce listing workflows, photo restoration, digital human voiceovers, and local video editing. Secrets, local models, node_modules, and large binaries are intentionally excluded.
name: aionext-value-skills
